quotes.text: The best time to plant a tree was 20 years ago. The second best time is now.
quotes.author: @naval

quotes.text: You are not a drop in the ocean. You are the entire ocean in a drop.
quotes.author: @RumiQuotes

quotes.text: Compound interest is the eighth wonder of the world. He who understands it, earns it. He who doesn't, pays it.
quotes.author: @naval

quotes.text: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way.
quotes.author: @RyanHoliday

quotes.text: Build things, tell people, be nice. That's all you need to know.
quotes.author: @dickc

quotes.text: Your work is going to fill a large part of your life, and the only way to be truly satisfied is to do what you believe is great work.
quotes.author: @elonmusk

quotes.text: Innovation distinguishes between a leader and a follower.
quotes.author: @elonmusk

quotes.text: The only way to do great work is to love what you do.
quotes.author: @timoreilly

quotes.text: First, solve the problem. Then, write the code.
quotes.author: @johnrobinson

quotes.text: The most dangerous phrase in the language is: We've always done it this way.
quotes.author: @Grady_Booch

quotes.text: Talk is cheap. Show me the code.
quotes.author: @linus__torvalds
